title: BEM-841 continue triad
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 16:14 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b839=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=b839.get('missing',[])
results=b839.get('dispatch_results_tail',[])
real=b839.get('real_responses',[])
runtime_started=b839.get('runtime_started_at')
runtime_completed=b839.get('runtime_completed_at')
if not missing:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='repair_dispatch_results'
    next_action='inspect processor/result writer and force valid dispatch result file'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='repair_claude_runtime_state'
    next_action='parse dispatch result then patch Claude dispatcher runtime state writer'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='repair_real_claude_response'
    next_action='patch Claude response writer/provider and retry; blocker files do not count'
else:
    status='repair_unknown_missing'
    next_action='diagnose missing '+str(missing)
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'bem839_status':b839.get('status'),'missing':missing,'runtime_started_at':runtime_started,'runtime_completed_at':runtime_completed,'dispatch_results_tail':results[-10:] if isinstance(results,list) else results,'real_responses':real[-10:] if isinstance(real,list) else real,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_continue_after_handoff_and_bem839.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_continue_after_handoff_and_bem839.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Continue After Handoff And BEM-839 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_continue_after_handoff_and_bem839.json','governance/reports/bem841_continue_after_handoff_and_bem839.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Continued after BEM-840 handoff by reading BEM-839 and selecting first missing triad proof repair')
"""
